description: A horizontal memorial graphic. At the left, an ICE badge emblem appears above the words Wall of Honor, with text below reading Special Agent Michael J. Reimers, End of Watch, Thursday, April 19, 1979. The center holds a portrait photograph of a man, and the right side shows a U.S. flag and a bouquet of red roses.
notable_text: Wall of Honor; Special Agent Michael J. Reimers; End of Watch; Thursday, April 19, 1979
